name: Boulder Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 whole boned and skinned chicken breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the beaten eggs and marinate overnight in a covered bowl.
3. The next day, roll each piece of chicken in bread crumbs.
4. Heat half of the butter over medium heat in a large skillet.
5. Slowly sauté the chicken in batches until golden brown, turning frequently, about 15 minutes total.
6. Remove the chicken to a warm plate and set aside.
7. In the same skillet, slowly sauté the mushrooms over medium heat until they are tender, about 10-12 minutes.
8. Place the chicken pieces in a greased 3-quart casserole dish.
9. Layer the mushrooms on top of the chicken.
10. Add layers of provolone cheese and chicken.
11. Pour the chicken broth over all the ingredients.
12. Sprinkle additional bread crumbs on top to taste.
13. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the casserole has set.
